title: Create Stuff N' Additions Curios Compat
description: Adds curios support to keeps the tanks off your inventory.
body:
# Create Stuff N' Additions Tank Curios Compat

So most of the code belongs to [Brassworks](https://github.com/Brassworks-smp/Create-Stuff-and-Addition-Tank-Fix) 
so I just stripped everything and just left curios as the latest patch of [Create-SA](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-stuff-additions/version/2.1.3)
merged most of these fixes and things lol.

So dont credit me credit Brassworks for most of the code.
